title: Simple Auto Totem
description:
Auto-equips a Totem of Undying to your offhand when it’s empty.

NOTE USING THIS MOD MIGHT GET YOU BANNED
body:
Features

Automatically moves a Totem of Undying from your inventory to your offhand when you don’t have one equipped.

With a 0ms Delay

Toggle on/off via a configurable key (default: R)

client-side only

NOTE: THIS MOD IS NOT MEANT TO BE USED FOR BREAKING ANY SERVER RULES
AND USING THIS MOD MIGHT GET YOU BANNED

Report issues at https://github.com/Mikah098091/auto_totem-1.21.8/issues

Made by MikahHD
